text.title: Threads Account Setup and Profile Optimization
text.summary: Profile optimization rules, Instagram integration, and bio formula for Threads account setup.

rule.statement: Use the same username as Instagram; keep bio under 160 characters with a clear what/who/CTA structure.
rule.rationale: Threads profile syncs from Instagram. Consistent username maximizes discoverability from the existing Instagram audience. Short bios with clear purpose outperform lengthy ones because Threads users scroll quickly.

list.item: Display name: may include keyword for searchability.
Bio: 160 chars max, formula: [What you do] + [Who you help] + [CTA or personality].
Link: one URL; update based on current campaign goal.
Profile photo: same as Instagram (synced automatically).

rule.statement: Import followers from Instagram immediately after account creation to seed the initial audience.
rule.rationale: Threads provides a built-in follower migration from Instagram. Not importing leaves the account starting from zero when an audience already exists on a connected platform.

list.item: Plan first week of content (minimum 5 posts/day).

text.reference: Bio formulas for founder, expert, and creator profiles
